title: koeleria pyrenaica
intro: Koeleria pyrenaica, also known as Pyrenean hair-grass or Pyrenean June grass, is a species of grass native to the Pyrenees and other parts of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Koeleria pyrenaica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Koeleria pyrenaica often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, syrups, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
